Open Source Interview Platform

From Zero to Hero

Silicon to Cloud everything in between. Master technical interviews with structured rubrics, real questions, and calibrated evaluation frameworks.

Start Your Journey → Pick Your Profile

Every Domain Covered

From bare-metal silicon to cloud-native microservices

🔧

Silicon & Embedded

FPGA, ASIC, RTOS, DMA, bootloaders, watchdogs
⚙️

C++ & Systems

Modern C++20, RAII, concurrency, template metaprogramming
🐧

Yocto & Linux

Recipes, layers, BitBake, device drivers, kernel modules
☁️

Backend & Cloud

Distributed systems, databases, microservices, Kafka
🚀

CI/CD & DevOps

GitLab pipelines, Docker, quality gates, OTA deployment
🌐

Frontend

React, state management, rendering, accessibility

Interview Rounds

Structured 60-minute rounds with scoring rubrics

01

Coding & DSA

Algorithms, data structures, complexity analysis

 02

Low-Level Design

OOP, SOLID, design patterns, class modeling

 03

High-Level Design

System architecture, scalability, trade-offs

 04

Infrastructure

CI/CD, observability, deployment strategies

 05

Behavioral

STAR method, leadership, conflict resolution

Level Calibration

Know exactly what's expected at each engineering level

1

SDE 1

0-2 yrs

Junior executes defined tasks, learns fundamentals

2

SDE 2

2-5 yrs

Mid owns features end-to-end, production-quality code

3

SDE 3

5-10 yrs

Senior drives technical direction, cross-team influence

4

SDE 4

10+ yrs

Staff organization-wide impact, defines architecture

View full calibration matrix →

Whether you're preparing as a candidate or calibrating as an interviewer we've got you covered.
